import React, { useState } from 'react' import Head from 'next/head' import raceDayCalc from './api/raceDayCalc' const About = () => { const [ raceDay, setRaceDay ] = useState("Jan 01, 2020") const raceDayStart = (e) => { e.preventDefault(); raceDayCalc() } return(
About
setRaceDay(e.target.value)}>

{raceDay}

) } export default About
